hf14ce82ag0704g4554gab1agb8fd86c9bb48: *You catch a waft of something foul - metallic and sickly-sweet.*
h0475ab71g0aa1g46eegb01bgcb085792f809: Powdered iron-vine. An old hunter's trick - most monsters will think twice before making a meal of me.
he70e2eccg0127g4415gb8dfgaf232146d999: You're a monster hunter? I'm surprised, I thought all Gur were vagrant cut-throats.
h73a52fb7g5544g4e25gb46cg73a29085dc18: And more! We steal chickens, curse your crops, seduce your daughters - the list goes on.
h6a3b4bc7g594cg47b7gaf91g3e3b4555e0aa: I wish I had half the power settled folk think my people possess. Alas, I am a simple wanderer.
hf3f36007gf332g4c2eg9a3cg959dc94eefcb: A simple wanderer and monster hunter. But I'm no witchdoctor or cut-throat.
h97e47f52g3677g497eg9882gc79ba52476d6: I assume you want to kill the hag?
h78bca314g2d5bg43c7ga124gb936d2edec55: Or to make a deal with her. Probably think you can outfox the old dear.
he1b16befgb29bg4150g9fe0g10b371451284: Right, but very wrong. My prey is a vampire spawn - much less impressive than the beast that lives here.
h77ce9c3dg0e60g4632g8529gca5bf16bbd67: I fear he's gone to ground. I hope the hag of these lands can help me flush him out, if I can afford her blood price.
hcce140b0g5ba8g45b5g86c7g17daef465d18: It is a sacred mission from the head of my tribe. She sent me here to capture the beast and return it to her.
hce0d8c85gc061g467cgbd9cg5e300aabfb14: Baldur's Gate. My people wait for me there.
h59d38996g58e8g4612gb39cgd5e41116f9e3: *Under all the smiles, you can feel Astarion's tension. He's coiled like a spring, hand inching towards his weapon.*
h1f410ecdg044fg4c5ag87f5ga43ed2d6efa9: Cough and give Astarion a warning look.
h6effddd4g4c8eg46e9gb1c9g7ad6669a2248: Is your friend ill? I have some tea that might help...
h175a0209g879eg4f14gb5c3ge2d6b24fefd5: How do you capture a vampire, exactly?
he4ce3cedgbc1eg4d1ega0bdgf59b89ccd40e: Beyond that, I will say no more. There are some trade secrets we cannot share.
hcb7c9812g85d9g4637gb7a9g5f8ef0f9ee68: We should go, but you have fun tracking your monster.
h23b7dc47g3d17g42ecg830age064d1be8dca: Why not join us? We could use a monster hunter.
hbb31994fg10c4g4861g9022ga31ec866f2fa: No! I mean - we have different quests. I wouldn't want to distract this fellow from his path, any more than he'd want to lead us from ours.
h76f6f3cdg9ff9g44eag9543g17c2a2d7a1ec: The elf is right. I have my own road to walk.
h0b950086gaf26g4d0cgaae2g1c6c1b9f1092: A more difficult road, now that the hag is gone, but perhaps a better one.
h8dfd7cdbga6f8g4da3ga36dga5f629bc2a0f: But I wish you well. Be safe.
hc6f523e7g82a6g418cgb165ge077838d4db2: A road that leads me straight to a hag's den, alas. But I wish you well. Be safe.
h498e0d5ag53a5g4fdagbe16gced893b65574: Thank you. Treating with a hag, I need all the luck I can get.
hd30b8d1agca28g4982g9f89g8730e5d55fa9: [To Astarion] You're asking a lot of questions.
h2e81c634g323ag4ec5ga225g89bac6cacdc8: There's a lot to know. I crossed paths with the Gur once before. Many, many years ago.
h05653d92g9ebbg4067gbb6egacc9f2cd4460: What the hells? He could have helped us!
h9f0c0e5bgc973g4c3egb1a8g333bb696f68e: The Gur help themselves, no one else. Whatever his price, it would've been too much.
h9af7f1e8ga41bg4632gaa93g07111cfcda61: Trust me, I did us a favour.
ha391152ege4deg45f1g8982ge0540b95c399: It's a figure of speech, darling. I'd be disappointed if you trusted me at all.
h4e52f090g0423g4268gb649g2f401f7123bf: Now, if we're done, we have more important business to get on with.
h7143132bgb182g4e96g8eb7g28312c42ab5d: What favour, exactly? He didn't need to die.
h4d9f2116g0ff0g40abg8bd5gdce56527a061: I had my reasons, you can be sure of that.
h26545a2bg0d4cg4cb1g9b4dgc3e81acfd66d: Next time, warn me before you murder someone.
hc207c32cga18eg4076g8b98g893ea41943ed: I absolutely, definitely will think about it.
h8c8b2efdg3f96g4122g9ecbg9743a8acf936: ...Tell me you had a good reason for that.
h0d841a05g38d8g42c7g8ed7gf4181c7adf44: He was spinning a tale, and you were falling for it. Vampires? Sacred missions? Honestly.
h952f7631g3d20g48e2ga701g5eff15135c5c: He would've followed us to camp and slit our throats in the night.
h5af4a53cg5551g4995gacdeg26a3acb152a7: Let's go, we've wasted enough time talking.
hfeb56bc7g968fg40a4gb3a0g3cce6abb2cb4: I've crossed paths with your people before, you know.
h0b2ba18cg74e2g48b1gb564ga5e78615443a: You're asking why a monster hunter would hunt a monster?
hc5514f5fg9829g4d49g9fa6gd3c77e170a6a: Just so. Vampires are godless parasites - we do not need a reason to destroy them.
hee73c611gfd36g4728gb0d0g2bdccec75983: But in this case, it is a sacred mission from the head of my tribe. She sent me here to capture the beast and return it to her.
h6dd7ab6eg6ebfg4cf7g8077g31c4bf9b51aa: Yes, yes, fine. It's just - specific. Why not kill the gnolls or goblins rampaging around here?
h0ef0f3bdg2e8eg41ddg9ee8gb6d6c39d2e7e: I fear he's gone to ground. I hoped the hag of these lands could help me flush him out, but it seems she is no more.
h2982f3aeg2acag4e44gb13bge090e818a5ab: His name is Astarion, but I fear he's gone to ground. I hope the hag of these lands can help me flush him out, if I can afford her blood price.
h65a32b90gb8d1g48ddg81a0g59835060bb70: And when you find this 'Astarion'? You'll kill him?
h7f933de6gc336g49bbg8dfdg928b10355929: Not this time. My orders are to capture him.
h8dc9f3d7g8177g4e6dgada0gc823a1886c64: Oh? And bring him where, exactly?
h50734de8g45c1g40d6gae23g52ebaa019344: Only a spawn? Pity. Not like it's a real vampire.
h8705bf7agb9eag47b9g8466g13371daee384: I don't know. I'm sure a vampire spawn could still rip your throat out if he felt like it.
hbb4c1bb8g9911g44bfg92deg88ec4032431d: He is right, unfortunately. They are only weak when compared to their masters.
hdac28ebdg3a4eg4112ga68bgd523f3f91b07: During the day, we have the advantage. But at night, when they hunt? You will not find a more deadly quarry.
h55916c41g0729g4d4fga9bdgad3b6a81df1b: Yes, I'm sure they can creep right up on you.
h61e87129g24bag425bga7dbg831aba60bf05: We've all survived so far. Let's focus on that.
h4acd06b6g2236g4267g9331g3f9bc5a32b71: It would still be wise to post guards at night. The threat is real.
hcb8607a4g6f2ag4fccgafc8gc1fc769113cb: Indeed it is. We should do something about this threat.
h34e02b0bg0f60g4e25g9e11g8b9bbc1a614c: All right, kill him if you must.
hcb34f0f4g001dg4ff1ga5c7gd7f1af424c2f: We'll be careful, but we should get going.
h3be10373g0a0fg4a1cg8f4ag8b35f60272fe: Wait - that's it? We're just walking away?
h4a7daf5cg3385g4597g82dfg8b454a8718b4: Interesting. Astarion, what do you think?
h9382b5beg5e6eg415dg843bga3ae4af8068e: These days, I'm making the impossible look easy.
h65efac6bg832dg484egbb24g56b738afa233: No, we're going to leave in peace.
h9c8682a4gaa61g40fcgb821g9a26bb34167a: Please do. But the vampire spawn is staying with me.
h80372fd6g1561g42f2gbbddg1b94e19f9e3a: I thank you for your help. My people work to rid this world of evil - you are a friend to our cause.
h4ce73a1bg5701g4f77ga345g93f442405e6c: It's amazing you survived, travelling with a beast like that.
h956bf67egb78cg425ag850eg9b225ecc14d7: I have a cage ready nearby - it will hold him when he wakes.
h8fde59d8gec7ag49eeg9364g6452c105c2f3: Thank you for this. And for cleansing this swamp of the hag. You have done good here today. Safe travels.
h6520f158g2adfg494bg86e0g46c435c2183f: I would have made a deal with the hag to find this. I'm very glad that I did not. Thank you and safe travels.
h69cc58ccgbf56g4d5cg9668gcb5125ee83c1: I'll return him to my tribe, as ordered. Whatever fate awaits him there, I'm sure it is deserved.
h3dfa4b35g2a5fg4b80g8254gd9ee527c5480: Take the spawn, just leave his stuff with me.
h9e82f016g1e94g4b38ga5a8g21a1b3dcd22e: It's yours. This is the only prize I need.
h4d590c96gb08cg459eg83beg3b5c1dbcbdb4: Don't do this. No one needs to die.
he3b6012bge9b4g4700g80beg4113ce1e7441: Well, I tried. Astarion? Kill the hunter.
h54d6d57bgdba9g431egaa30g5f318f932f17: Thank you for the warning, we'll be careful.
h4cf8fdaag9fb1g48f1g81bdgc4958078aa22: Don't you think we should do something about the ... vampire issue?
he9303f21g779ag47b9g83feg1f4fb57c1fa3: I said we'll be careful. Now let's go.
h58879adcg8297g4b5dgaba5g8ac9b714fc3c: Fine. But if this comes back to bite us, it's on your head.
h081a8c34g9dd6g4904gb194g1660fdbf9455: Go in peace, my friends. I pray our paths cross again.
h7c2ffdaeg7805g41e4g9b1cg3bdae96f0a68: Fine. This is Astarion, the vampire spawn you're hunting.
hd0130546gf6f0g4946g89f0g33022e73b293: You idiot. What have you done?
hfe294b0ag1f88g4f9bg92e2g567976efee76: I've delivered a monster to a monster hunter.
h1c9f02d5g7f4cg4123gb92cg1c8250ce482e: Relax, he's not taking you anywhere.
h69f02da6gd2e9g496bgaf3fg1209b14f7dd1: Time for us to go! Good luck with your quest.
h92c95234gf6a2g410aga4c3g2fc54af6008a: Well, here he is. This is Astarion.
hab4e0410gb6d8g4131g9da1g815a190cc416: His name is Astarion, but I fear he's gone to ground. I was hoping the hag of these lands could help me flush him out, but it seems she is no more.
h7fd37147g3dd1g413bg9e8eg39ebb7e24e10: So what monster are you hunting?
h6ec35cb0ga13fg4099g9c3bgb9b06fa7548a: Something terrifying, no doubt. Dragon? Cyclops? Kobold?
h0ddccddcg323ag4f20gb781g5ef34b92d6ad: Nothing so dramatic. I'm hunting for a vampire spawn.
hf6764664gb978g4972gbddcg2a89c4a5af13: If I were a cut-throat, I wouldn't admit it either.
hd665546eg83bdg4907ga207g8c4ab5347a91: True. And I have no proof to offer but my word.
h54e634e3ga349g4355g90f0g4d9b6ad35158: If you wish it, our paths need not cross again. I'm hunting a vampire spawn, and it is a little too bright for you to be my prey.
haf89c39cg090dg4f8ag97c7gc9b9a7c50ef6: Pardon, but who - or what - is a Gur?
h4f451b77gbb26g4742gbed7g604d07dd6515: A mystical and dangerous people, we travel the land, never settling in one place.
heb9d529bg8710g4305g8f9bg11f1ec6303b1: We steal your chickens, curse your crops, seduce your daughters - your friend here has heard it all, I'm sure.
h3e3c5879g8a02g4e40gaef4g0625b978288b: Takes one to know one, I suppose.
h38cf1eddg16e6g44a2g98c6gbd8d14fd1871: Your friend has just heard the rumours of my people. That we steal chickens, curse your crops, seduce your daughters...
h6248912cg2597g4c66g8c03gf1015cc81eba: Be nice, Astarion. Gandrel here has been looking for you.
hb557cdfdgcbccg4f5bgbc98gccfc4131c618: Ignore the elf. He talks too much.
h0b6797fcgbd3dg43efgb6d5g022893aa7e6f: You should listen to your companion. Next he'll warn you that my people can curse your cow to give only sour milk and will seduce your daughter to a life of roaming.
h266c6378g7064g4b01g8b98g40d74d7a0251: You've tracked me down again, my friend. Would that I had as much luck with the beast I'm hunting.
hfe3a6c1cge26eg4445g9f14gacd94301375d: What'll you do when you find him? Kill the vampire?
h84dc4d00gec39g4ee2g99a1gecdae574d5a1: I'm here to help. This is Astarion - the vampire you're hunting.
